/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/openssl@3/lib CMakeFiles/demo_arithmetization.dir/reductions/ram_to_r1cs/examples/demo_arithmetization.cpp.o -o demo_arithmetization  libsnark.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_program_options.dylib ../depends/libff/libff/libff.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmpxx.dylib -lcrypto /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib
